data.title: RED test: harvest-worktree.sh merge orchestration
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Write a failing test file for harvest-worktree.sh. Tests create synthetic worktree branches with gate artifacts, then invoke the script and assert on exit codes, written files, and git state.

### Files to create
- tests/scripts/test-harvest-worktree.sh

### Test approach (Given/When/Then)
- Given: a git repo with a worktree branch containing changes and passing gate artifacts (test-gate-status=passed, review-status=passed)
- When: harvest-worktree.sh <branch> <worktree-path> is invoked from the session branch
- Then: a merge commit is produced, session artifacts dir contains test-gate-status and review-status with status=passed, current diff hash, and attest_source field

### Test cases
1. test_clean_merge_produces_commit — happy path: worktree with passing gates, merge produces commit
2. test_exit2_when_test_gate_missing — exits 2 when worktree test-gate-status is absent
3. test_exit2_when_review_status_missing — exits 2 when worktree review-status is absent
4. test_exit2_when_test_gate_failed — exits 2 when worktree test-gate-status has status=failed
5. test_exit1_on_non_test_index_conflict — exits 1 and aborts merge on non-.test-index file conflict
6. test_merge_head_cleaned_on_failure — MERGE_HEAD does not persist after any failure path
7. test_no_merge_head_on_entry — exits with error if MERGE_HEAD already exists on entry
8. test_attest_source_in_status_files — attested status files include source worktree ID

### .test-index
Update .test-index with RED marker [test_clean_merge_produces_commit] for plugins/dso/scripts/harvest-worktree.sh

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/scripts/test-harvest-worktree.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-harvest-worktree.sh
- [ ] Test file contains at least 8 test functions
  Verify: grep -c 'test_' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-harvest-worktree.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 8)}'
- [ ] .test-index updated with RED marker for harvest-worktree.sh
  Verify: grep '\[test_clean_merge_produces_commit\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] Tests fail (RED) against current codebase (harvest-worktree.sh not yet implemented)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-harvest-worktree.sh 2>&1; test $? -ne 0
